title: centrosema bracteosum
intro: Centrosema bracteosum, also known as the showy Centrosema or wild cowpea, is a perennial legume native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centrosema bracteosum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as showing potential in the treatment of diabetes and cancer. Centrosema bracteosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including dried leaves and roots.
